'''âg-n-h-s''' ('''kaganhesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moonrun|moonrun]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-n-h-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moonrun|moonrun]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-n-h-s
|-
! Lemma
| kaganhesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiganhesoko|thiganhesoko]] || [[word:jiganhesoko|jiganhesoko]] || [[word:shiganhesoko|shiganhesoko]] || [[word:kiganhesoko|kiganhesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuganhesoko|thuthuganhesoko]] || [[word:jujuganhesoko|jujuganhesoko]] || [[word:shushuganhesoko|shushuganhesoko]] || [[word:kukuganhesoko|kukuganhesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuganhesoko|thuganhesoko]] || [[word:juganhesoko|juganhesoko]] || [[word:shuganhesoko|shuganhesoko]] || [[word:kuganhesoko|kuganhesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuganhesoko|thuganhesoko]] || [[word:juganhesoko|juganhesoko]] || [[word:shuganhesoko|shuganhesoko]] || [[word:kuganhesoko|kuganhesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theganhesoko|theganhesoko]] || [[word:jeganhesoko|jeganhesoko]] || [[word:sheganhesoko|sheganhesoko]] || [[word:keganhesoko|keganhesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoganhesoko|thothoganhesoko]] || [[word:jojoganhesoko|jojoganhesoko]] || [[word:shoshoganhesoko|shoshoganhesoko]] || [[word:kokoganhesoko|kokoganhesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoganhesoko|thoganhesoko]] || [[word:joganhesoko|joganhesoko]] || [[word:shoganhesoko|shoganhesoko]] || [[word:koganhesoko|koganhesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoganhesoko|thoganhesoko]] || [[word:joganhesoko|joganhesoko]] || [[word:shoganhesoko|shoganhesoko]] || [[word:koganhesoko|koganhesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠganhesoko|thĂŠganhesoko]] || [[word:jĂŠganhesoko|jĂŠganhesoko]] || [[word:shĂŠganhesoko|shĂŠganhesoko]] || [[word:kĂŠganhesoko|kĂŠganhesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thaganhesoko|thaganhesoko]] || [[word:jaganhesoko|jaganhesoko]] || [[word:shaganhesoko|shaganhesoko]] || [[word:kaganhesoko|kaganhesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thaganhesoko|thaganhesoko]] || [[word:jaganhesoko|jaganhesoko]] || [[word:shaganhesoko|shaganhesoko]] || [[word:kaganhesoko|kaganhesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shaganhesithi|shaganhesithi]] || [[word:shaganhesiji|shaganhesiji]] || [[word:shaganhesishi|shaganhesishi]] || [[word:shaganhesiki|shaganhesiki]]
